content.json:
# Continuous Evaluation & Monitoring Dashboard

Real-time visibility into AI application quality, health, and safety.

---

## 0. Telemetry Health Check

Verify that data is flowing from the application into Application Insights. If all counts are 0, check your `APPLICATIONINSIGHTS_CONNECTION_STRING` and run the validation script.

content.query:
union withsource=TableName customMetrics, requests, traces, exceptions, dependencies
| summarize EventCount=count(), LatestEvent=max(timestamp) by TableName
| extend HoursSinceLastEvent=round(datetime_diff('second', now(), LatestEvent) / 3600.0, 1)
| project TableName, EventCount, LatestEvent, HoursSinceLastEvent
| order by TableName asc
content.title: Data Ingestion Summary (all tables)

content.query:
customMetrics
| where name startswith 'ce.' or name startswith 'agent.'
| summarize EventCount=count(), AvgValue=round(avg(value), 2), LatestEvent=max(timestamp) by name
| order by name asc
content.title: Custom Metrics Inventory (ce.* and agent.*)

content.json:
---
## 1. Evaluation Trends (CE)

Groundedness, Coherence, Relevance, and Safety scores over time — from Continuous Evaluation runs.

content.query:
customMetrics
| where name startswith 'ce.score.' and name != 'ce.score.average'
| extend evaluator = coalesce(
    tostring(customDimensions.evaluator),
    extract(@'ce\.score\.(.+)', 1, name)
  )
| where isnotempty(evaluator)
| summarize avg_score=avg(value) by evaluator, bin(timestamp, 1h)
| render timechart
content.title: Evaluation Score Trends (per evaluator)

content.query:
customMetrics
| where name startswith 'ce.score.' and name != 'ce.score.average'
| extend evaluator = coalesce(
    tostring(customDimensions.evaluator),
    extract(@'ce\.score\.(.+)', 1, name)
  )
| where isnotempty(evaluator)
| summarize arg_max(timestamp, value) by evaluator
| project evaluator, score=round(value, 2), last_updated=format_datetime(timestamp, 'yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss')
| order by evaluator asc
content.title: Latest Evaluation Scores

content.query:
customMetrics
| where name == 'ce.score.average'
| summarize avg_score=avg(value) by bin(timestamp, 1h)
| render areachart
content.title: Average Evaluation Score Over Time

content.json:
---
## 2. Agent Health (CM)

Latency percentiles, error rates, and request volume from the multi-agent system.

content.query:
requests
| where url endswith '/chat' or name has 'chat'
| summarize p50=percentile(duration, 50), p95=percentile(duration, 95), p99=percentile(duration, 99) by bin(timestamp, 5m)
| render timechart
content.title: Chat Endpoint Latency (P50/P95/P99 ms)

content.query:
requests
| where url endswith '/chat' or name has 'chat'
| summarize total=count(), failed=countif(success == false), success_rate=round(100.0 * countif(success == true) / count(), 1) by bin(timestamp, 15m)
| render timechart
content.title: Request Volume & Success Rate

content.query:
customMetrics
| where name == 'agent.request.duration'
| extend agent_name = tostring(customDimensions['agent.name'])
| where isnotempty(agent_name)
| summarize p50=percentile(value, 50), p95=percentile(value, 95), count=count() by agent_name
| project agent_name, p50_ms=round(p50, 0), p95_ms=round(p95, 0), requests=count
| order by requests desc
content.title: Per-Agent Latency & Request Count

content.query:
customMetrics
| where name == 'agent.request.count'
| extend agent_name = tostring(customDimensions['agent.name'])
| where isnotempty(agent_name)
| summarize total_requests=sum(value) by agent_name, bin(timestamp, 15m)
| render barchart
content.title: Agent Request Volume Over Time

content.query:
customMetrics
| where name == 'agent.error.count'
| extend agent_name = tostring(customDimensions['agent.name'])
| summarize errors=sum(value) by agent_name, bin(timestamp, 15m)
| render barchart
content.title: Agent Error Count

content.query:
traces
| where severityLevel >= 2
| extend module = tostring(customDimensions.module)
| summarize count() by severityLevel, bin(timestamp, 15m)
| render barchart
content.title: Warning/Error Traces Over Time

content.query:
traces
| where message has 'agent' or message has 'orchestrator' or message has 'evaluation' or message has 'Tracked metric' or message has 'Exported'
| project timestamp, message, severityLevel, customDimensions
| order by timestamp desc
| take 50
content.title: Recent Agent & Evaluation Log Messages

content.json:
---
## 3. Alerts & Regressions (CE + CM)

Red team results, score regressions, and recent exceptions.

content.query:
customMetrics
| where name startswith 'ce.redteam.'
| extend category = tostring(customDimensions.category), result = tostring(customDimensions.result)
| where isnotempty(category)
| summarize probes=sum(value) by category, result
| render barchart
content.title: Red Team Results by Category

content.query:
customMetrics
| where name startswith 'ce.score.' and name != 'ce.score.average'
| extend evaluator = coalesce(tostring(customDimensions.evaluator), extract('ce[.]score[.](.+)', 1, name))
| where isnotempty(evaluator)
| extend latest_value = value, previous_value = value
| summarize arg_max(timestamp, latest_value), arg_min(timestamp, previous_value) by evaluator
| extend delta = round(latest_value - previous_value, 2)
| project evaluator, latest_score=round(latest_value, 2), previous_score=round(previous_value, 2), delta
| order by delta asc
content.title: Score Regressions (Latest vs Previous)

content.query:
exceptions
| summarize count() by type, bin(timestamp, 1h)
| render barchart
content.title: Exceptions Over Time

content.query:
requests
| where success == false
| project timestamp, name, url, resultCode, duration, operation_Id
| order by timestamp desc
| take 20
content.title: Recent Failed Requests

content.query:
dependencies
| where target has 'openai' or target has 'cognitiveservices'
| summarize avg_duration=round(avg(duration), 0), call_count=count(), failure_rate=round(100.0 * countif(success == false) / count(), 1) by target, bin(timestamp, 15m)
| render timechart
content.title: Azure OpenAI Dependency Health
